title: School Hours
schoolHoursDescription: Enable teaching days and define a period schedule to apply to all of them.
applyToAllAndContinue: Apply to all active days & continue →
noSchoolDaySelected: Enable at least one school day above to see the weekly schedule.
addPeriodFirstToSeeSchedule: Add at least one period to the template first
resetToTemplateTitle: Reset all active days to template?
resetToTemplateDesc: This will replace each active day's schedule with the current period template. Individual changes will be lost.
toggleCellDesc: Toggle individual cells to enable or disable a slot for a specific day.
templateChangeWarning: Changing the template will not automatically reset days that have already been customised.
